title: Recognize the Standard Form
text: The given equation is in the standard form of an circle:x**2+y**2=r**2, where $$r^2=10$$, so $$r=\sqrt{10}$$.

title: Use Trigonometric Parametric Equations
text: For a circle, the standard parametric equations are: $$x(t)=rcos(t)$$, $$y(t)=rsin(t)$$.

title: Substitute the Value
text: Plug $$r=\sqrt{10}$$ into the standard parametric equations.
